offensive_abilities.name: Jump Jet
offensive_abilities.text: The firework pogo moves exclusively via Leaping. For each action spent to Drive, the pogo Leaps 20 feet horizontally or 10 feet vertically.

offensive_abilities.name: Unstable Launch
offensive_abilities.text: When the pilot uses a 3-action activity to recklessly Drive the firework pogo, it emits a burst of flames on launch that deals 3d6 fire damage to the pilot, the pogo itself, and each creature in a 10-foot radius (DC 19 basic Reflex save).

statistics.space: 5 feet long, 5 feet wide, 5 feet high

traits.name: Uncommon
traits.text: Something of uncommon rarity requires special training or comes from a particular culture or part of the world. Some character choices give access to uncommon options, and the GM can choose to allow access for anyone. Less is known about uncommon creatures than common creatures. They typically can't be summoned. The DC of Recall Knowledge checks related to these creature is increased by 2.
